chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
text:
(a) Notwithstanding any other law, a county may use any county property for a project under this chapter, regardless of when or how the property is acquired.

(b) In addition to authority granted by other law, a county may use state highway right-of-way and may access state highway right-of-way in accordance with Sections 228.011 (Toll Projects in Certain Counties) , 373.101 (Use of State Highway Right-of-way) , and 373.102 (Reimbursement for Use of Right-of-way) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.004 — Use of County Property

(a) Notwithstanding any other law, a county may use any county property for a project under this chapter, regardless of when or how the property is acquired.

(b) In addition to authority granted by other law, a county may use state highway right-of-way and may access state highway right-of-way in accordance with Sections 228.011 (Toll Projects in Certain Counties) , 373.101 (Use of State Highway Right-of-way) , and 373.102 (Reimbursement for Use of Right-of-way) .

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1196 (S.B.19), Sec. 5, eff. June 17, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Notwithstanding any other law, a county may use any county property for a project under this chapter, regardless of when or how the property is acquired.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In addition to authority granted by other law, a county may use state highway right-of-way and may access state highway right-of-way in accordance with Sections 228.011 (Toll Projects in Certain Counties) , 373.101 (Use of State Highway Right-of-way) , and 373.102 (Reimbursement for Use of Right-of-way) .

history.raw: Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1196 (S.B.19), Sec. 5, eff. June 17, 2011.
